name: Five-Spice Appetizer Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red sweet pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine egg white, bread crumbs, five-spice powder, and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Add beef; mix well.
2. Shape into forty-eight 1-inch meatballs.
3. Place in a 15x10x1-inch baking pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 20 minutes or until no pink remains in the center of the meatballs.
4. Drain.
5. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan, stir together orange juice, honey, cornstarch, soy sauce, and ginger. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cook and stir for 2 more minutes.
6. Add sweet pepper and meatballs to the saucepan; cook and stir until heated through. Keep warm in a fondue pot or chafing dish.
7. Serve with toothpicks.
Makes 48 appetizer-size meatballs.
Source: Special Advertising Section for Florida Citrus.
